
::: {.paper-table}
**Table 36. C.9 Parapsychology — the limit case**

| Finding | Published effect | Implication if true | Source |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Precognition of future stimuli | 9 experiments, p < 0.05 in 8 | The effect of a future event can be detected in present behavior; time-reversed causation in human cognition | Bem 2011 JPSP |
| Telepathic ganzfeld hit rates | ~32% vs. 25% chance | Mind-to-mind information transfer operates at a small but reliable rate | Honorton and meta-analyses |
| Global Consciousness Project — RNG deviations during major events | p small across events | Collective human attention substantially influences physical random-number generators | PEAR lab and successors |
:::
